title: Joby Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
text: Joby Aviation reported Q1 2026 financial results with significant milestones. The company launched its Electric Skies Tour with demonstrations in San Francisco and New York City. Key achievements include completing the SR3 audit with the FAA—described as the third of four major reviews in the certification process. Manufacturing scaled significantly with composites production running at more than 2.5 times last year's volume. The company was named a partner in multiple winning eVTOL Integration Pilot Program applications. Cash position: $2.5 billion in cash, cash equivalents, and short-term investments at quarter end. CEO JoeBen Bevirt stated the quarter represented an extraordinary period with the clearest path to beginning passenger operations.
